# Seal Documentation for LLMs

> Seal is a decentralized secrets management protocol on the Sui blockchain. It enables secure encryption and access control for onchain data using threshold cryptography.

## Top Level Navigation

- [Aggregator — Aggregator](https://seal-docs.wal.app/Aggregator.md)
- [Design — Design](https://seal-docs.wal.app/Design.md)
- [ExamplePatterns — ExamplePatterns](https://seal-docs.wal.app/ExamplePatterns.md)
- [GettingStarted — GettingStarted](https://seal-docs.wal.app/GettingStarted.md)
- [KeyServerCommitteeOps —
    KeyServerCommitteeOps](https://seal-docs.wal.app/KeyServerCommitteeOps.md)
- [KeyServerOps — KeyServerOps](https://seal-docs.wal.app/KeyServerOps.md)
- [Pricing — Pricing](https://seal-docs.wal.app/Pricing.md)
- [SealCLI — SealCLI](https://seal-docs.wal.app/SealCLI.md)
- [SecurityBestPractices —
    SecurityBestPractices](https://seal-docs.wal.app/SecurityBestPractices.md)
- [ServerOverview — ServerOverview](https://seal-docs.wal.app/ServerOverview.md)
- [TermsOfService — TermsOfService](https://seal-docs.wal.app/TermsOfService.md)
- [UsingSeal — UsingSeal](https://seal-docs.wal.app/UsingSeal.md)
